events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer raw JSON no markdown. Need decide pass/fail etc. Scenario: PVC expansion fitting omitted on long exterior run. Industrial site, rigid & PVC conduit rough-complete. NEC Art. 352 (PVC conduit) requires expansion fittings where temperature changes or length of run cause expansion/contraction. Long exterior run likely subject to temperature changes; expansion fitting omitted => non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk? Could be medium/high due to thermal expansion causing joint separation, conduit damage, grounding, exposure. Maybe high in industrial. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 70. Value not asked 0. Sound source etc default? Schema has these fields; we must include all. For non audio tasks use defaults: sound_source: "", event_time: 0, rate: 0, order: [], workable: []. Findings list. Actions: install expansion fitting per NEC/manufacturer. Rationale. References: NEC Article 352.44? Actually Article 352 Rigid Polyvinyl Chloride Conduit: Type PVC. Expansion fittings required 352.44. Article 344 for rigid metal maybe no issue. Use NEC 352.44. Need ensure valid JSON.

NEC Article 352 requires expansion fittings where conduit movement due to temperature change must be accommodated. Omitting the expansion fitting risks joint separation, conduit damage, and loss of wiring protection.","references":["NEC Article 352 (PVC Conduit)","NEC 352.44 Expansion Fittings"]}
